content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 2.1 WARN — App is login-gated (App/LoginView.swift:7 SecureField) but demo credentials are placeholders ("test"/"changeme") and notes.txt just says "TBD" (fastlane/metadata/review_information/{demo_user.txt,demo_password.txt,notes.txt}).
Pierre: Apple's reviewers cannot proceed past the sign-in screen without valid, working credentials and clear instructions on how to reach gated features — placeholder values like "test"/"changeme"/"TBD" will almost certainly get the app rejected under 2.1 for being unreviewable. Please provide a real demo account that actually authenticates, and write notes explaining any steps needed to reach core functionality (e.g., subscription paywall bypass, feature unlocks).
